sellers_note: Discover the versatile and well-equipped 2014 Nissan Rogue SV, a crossover SUV built to elevate your driving experience. Dual-zone automatic climate control, BluetoothÂ® connectivity, and a premium audio system with SiriusXM satellite radio ensure you and your passengers stay connected and entertained. Powered by a 2.5L I4 DOHC 16V engine paired with a smooth-shifting CVT with Xtronic, this Rogue SV delivers an impressive blend of performance and efficiency, with an EPA-estimated 25 city/32 highway MPG. Safety is also a top priority, with features like Electronic Stability Control, Brake Assist, and a suite of airbags to help protect you and your loved ones. The Rogue SVs well-rounded capabilities and thoughtful design make it an exceptional choice in the crowded crossover segment.
